question: Define a `MediaItem` base class with private attributes `title` and `duration`. Derive two classes, `Movie` and `Song`, from `MediaItem`. `Movie` should add a `director` attribute, and `Song` should add an `artist` attribute. Provide appropriate constructors and getters for all classes.

test_cases.expected:
--- Testing MediaItem Hierarchy (Readability/Efficiency Issue) ---

Movie 1 Details:
  Title: Interstellar
  Duration: 169 minutes
  Director: Christopher Nolan

Song 1 Details:
  Title: Stairway to Heaven
  Duration: 482 seconds
  Artist: Led Zeppelin

Movie 2 Details:
  Title: The Matrix
  Duration: 136 minutes
  Director: The Wachowskis

Song 2 Details:
  Title: Hotel California
  Duration: 390 seconds
  Artist: Eagles

Song destructor for 'Hotel California' called.
Movie destructor for 'The Matrix' called.
Song destructor for 'Stairway to Heaven' called.
Movie destructor for 'Interstellar' called.
MediaItem destructor for 'Hotel California' called.
MediaItem destructor for 'The Matrix' called.
MediaItem destructor for 'Stairway to Heaven' called.
MediaItem destructor for 'Interstellar' called.
